hero.hero_overview: Alucard is a melee fighter known for high lifesteal and strong burst damage. He excels in jungle farming and can quickly snowball once he gains items. His playstyle focuses on diving into fights, sustaining through damage, and eliminating squishy enemies.
hero.hero_strength:
Strong lifesteal allows high sustain in fights
Fast jungle clear and good farming speed
High burst damage against isolated targets
Great at chasing and finishing enemies
hero.hero_weakness:
Weak to crowd control (stuns, slows)
Struggles against multiple enemies at once early game
Needs items to become effective
Can be easily kited by ranged heroes

spell.spell_desc:
Required for jungle role
Helps secure buffs, turtle, and lord
Ice Retribution slows enemies  easier chase

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Mathilda is an excellent ally for Alucard because her mobility and shield let him engage or escape safely, and her follow-up burst amplifies his dueling and snowball potential, making it easier for him to dive squishy targets and survive skirmishes.

counters.counter_desc: Alucard counters almost any mobility heroes with the help of his short skill cooldowns and his passive where he can chase and catch up to enemies almost endlessly.
Chou's crowd control, knock ups and mobility can lock down Alucard, interrupt his combos and kite him effectively, making it very difficult for Alucard to stick to targets or survive in fights.

dominants.dominant_desc: Alucard's dominant phase is mid game, where he reaches level 4-12. This phase is Alucard's peak where he can farm efficiently, target isolated opponents, squishy enemies behind teamfights and split-push safely while leveraging his mobility and lifesteal.

emblems.emblem_desc: This emblem set helps Alucard with early burst damage, increases physical attacks gained from equipments and skills and helps with cooldowns so Alucard can do more frequent combos.

equips.equip_desc: This build helps with early damage, survival and combos all necessary for clash.

hero.hero_overview: Alucard is a melee fighter/assassin who dominates close range-dueling and is the former lifesteal king.
hero.hero_strength: Alucard is a high-sustain melee fighter with strong 1v1 dueling, excellent lifesteal, and good mobility. He can snowball early kills, clear waves quickly, and split-push effectively, making him deadly in skirmishes and scaling well into late game, but he is vulnerable to heavy crowd control and anti-heal effects.
hero.hero_weakness: Alucard is vulnerable to heavy crowd control, kiting, and anti-heal items. He struggles in early team fights without farm and items, and can be shut down by poke damage or coordinated CC before he engages.

spell.spell_desc: Retribution is ideal for Alucard because it speeds up jungle farming, helps secure objectives, and allows him to reach his core items faster to snowball early.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Together with Floryn's healing ability Alucard is near invincible
Together with Tigreal's ulti and Alucard's ulti, marking 5 enemies with Alu's ult will grant him 100 hybrid defense making him an absolute life steal sustain demon while having a good damage

counters.counter_desc: Basically any heroes that excell at stun

dominants.dominant_desc: As doable as possible SNOWBALL as early as possible for tower diving and 1v5 situations

emblems.emblem_desc:
Rupture for Physical penetration for early game damage and for base stat physical penetration
Festival of Blood for spell vamp for 1v5 situations and for sustainability or you can also use seasoned hunter
Temporal Reign for skill cooldown during ultimate casting and better burst potential

equips.equip_desc:

Endless Battle to further more enhanceAlucard's passive
Queen's Wings for mid game tanking and sustainability 
Maleficent Roar to make up with it's lack of damage
Rose Gold for Life steal, sustainability, and tanking

spell.spell_desc: Alu can't compete with EXP meta rn so jungle Alu is a lot more beneficial to you're team

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Alucard thrives when enemies are locked down, allowing him to freely unleash his skills and basic attacks to maximize his lifesteal and damage. Heroes like Tigreal (Flicker + Ultimate), Atlas (Fatal Links), or Franco (Iron Hook + Bloody Hunt) can stun or suppress key enemy targets, creating perfect opportunities for Alucard to dive in and secure kills without being immediately kited or CC'd himself. Chou's Jeet Kune Do and The Way of Dragon also provide excellent single-target lockdown.

Alucard thrives when enemies are locked down, allowing him to freely unleash his skills and basic attacks to maximize his lifesteal and damage. Heroes like Tigreal (Flicker + Ultimate), Atlas (Fatal Links), or Franco (Iron Hook + Bloody Hunt) can stun or suppress key enemy targets, creating perfect opportunities for Alucard to dive in and secure kills without being immediately kited or CC'd himself. Chou's Jeet Kune Do and The Way of Dragon also provide excellent single-target lockdown.

counters.counter_desc: While Alucard has strong lifesteal, an extra layer of defense from shields or damage reduction can make him virtually unkillable during his ultimate. Angela's Heartguard (Ultimate) can attach to Alucard, providing a shield and enabling her to deal damage and slow enemies while he focuses on offense. Rafaela and Estes provide continuous healing, further boosting his sustain.

dominants.dominant_desc: This phase typically begins once Alucard has acquired 2-3 core damage items (like Endless Battle, Hunter Strike, and Blade of Despair) and has reached level 8-10 or higher. At this point, his damage output, lifesteal, and overall survivability dramatically increase, allowing him to dominate skirmishes and contribute significantly to team fights.
dominants.dominant_title: Mid to late game Power spike

emblems.emblem_desc: I chose the Brave Smite emblem set primarily for the sustain it provides. For heroes like Alucard, who rely heavily on skill damage to engage and survive in fights, recovering 5% of Max HP every 6 seconds upon dealing skill damage to an enemy hero significantly enhances his durability. This talent allows him to continuously heal during skirmishes and extended team fights, reducing his need to recall to base frequently and keeping him in the action longer. The extra HP recovery synergizes well with his natural lifesteal, making him much harder to take down and improving his farming efficiency by allowing him to clear jungle camps or lanes with less health loss. It essentially transforms his offensive skills into a defensive advantage, making him a more formidable and resilient fighter.

equips.equip_desc: This equipment build is designed to maximize physical damage output, enhance lifesteal and sustain, and provide crucial defensive utilities for a fighter or assassin hero, particularly one like Alucard. The combination of damage items ensures strong offensive presence, while the specific defensive items help in surviving burst damage and prolonged team fights. This build aims to make the hero a formidable force in both skirmishes and late-game engagements by balancing aggression with necessary survivability.

hero.hero_overview: This is for Alucard's background, role, farming routes, and more.
hero.hero_strength: This is for Alucard's laning/farming advantages, team fight advantages, early/mid/late game advantages, and favorable characteristics.
hero.hero_weakness: - Vulnerable to Crowd Control (CC): This is his biggest weakness. Stuns, silences, and other CC effects can completely shut down Alucard, preventing him from using his skills and lifesteal to survive.

hero.hero_overview: Alucard is considered one of the strongest heroes when it comes to chasing, finishing and dishing out damage to the enemy backlines or even the tanky frontlines when equipped with better equipment and used properly.
hero.hero_strength: Alucard's strength is his power spike. When he gets his ultimate, he can slow down enemies and kill them. He's a slightly fast wave clearer because of his 2nd skill aoe to minions. And quite tanky even if you build him in damage build. And his skill cooldowns are so short you can spam and continuesly dish out damage while also absorb damage because of his tankiness and his ability to lifesteal. Whether it's basic attack or skills.
hero.hero_weakness: Alucard's greatest weakness is chain crowd control. When he gets locked down, it's very hard to recover since he relies on using his skills to regenerate health immediately.

dominants.dominant_desc: Alucard is strongest in the mid game once core items are completed. Focus on picking off squishy targets, securing objectives after successful ganks, and avoiding full team fights unless enemies have used their crowd control. Proper timing and positioning allow Alucard to snowball and control skirmishes effectively.

hero.hero_overview: Alucard is a melee Fighter/Assassin who excels at sustained combat through high spell vamp and mobility. He is commonly played in the jungle but can also function as a sidelaner in specific drafts. Alucard relies on chaining skills and basic attacks to stay in fights, healing through damage dealt rather than disengaging. Despite recent nerfs to his sustain and damage scaling, Alucard remains effective when built with the right items and played with good timing and target selection.
hero.hero_strength: Alucard excels in sustained skirmishes due to his spell vamp and mobility, allowing him to chase and eliminate low-mobility targets effectively. He has strong snowball potential when ahead, performs well in small-scale fights, and can remain impactful despite recent nerfs when built with the correct items and played with proper timing.
hero.hero_weakness: After recent nerfs, Alucard is more reliant on item progression and is heavily punished when falling behind. He is highly vulnerable to crowd control, burst damage, and anti-heal effects, and he struggles in full team fights without frontline support or precise target selection.

War axe for Lifestyle&true damage since my build doesn't have much physical damage
Endless battle lifestyle and its unique passive divine justice after casting a skill, the next basic attack within 3s deals (+0.6 total physical attack) extra true damage and recovers 80 (+0.4 total physical attack) HP (1.5s cooldown) this would make war axe a good combined item since it has extra true damage

spell.spell_desc: Would make you last longer when teamfights or from enemy trying to burst you

cooperates.cooperate_desc: With Mino heals and stun he can be a great pair for Alucard since in sets alu can just jump to join the fight while mino heals after set which can help Alucard sustain more.
Tigreal is one of the iconic and useful in teamfight since tigreal ult can pull enemies together which can help Alucard hit his ult on enemies.

counters.counter_desc: Minsitthar is one of Alucard's counter since his ult can Neutralize Alucard's dash like S1 which is crucial for escaping, initiating and slowness for enemies but he is not akways the counter for Alucard since Alucard's passive can still be used even inside minsitthar's ult.
Kufra is hell since its S2 can completely Neutralize Alucard's dash and yes even his passive too he cannot dash which is why I give this Kufra a huge advantage in countering Alucard.

Phoveus counters Alucard since Alucard benefits in dash from his S1 and passive which activates Phoveus passive and give him more skills just fron Alucard's dash but he can still be countered if you play correctly and build correctly.

dominants.dominant_desc:
When picking Alu make sure you are not countered by enemies such as Kufra, Minsitthar, Franco, Kaja and other heroes to completely slowed, stunned, suppressed, or heroes that prevent you from dashing. 

Alucard is a hero that can be dominant if played wisely especially with discipline since some players think that alu is just a tap-tap hero but they must've not reached the true use of Alucard since it is all about patience, humble, non-overconfident and teamwork. I sound like I am spitting caps but it's the truth since Alucard is best as initiator or chaser but sometimes you can just be a patience one by waiting for your team to initiate and let them bait their skills then you can jump in to join the fight which is crucial to best counter enemy damage or stuns. And no don't always go for 1v5 since it doesn't always work unless you want to bait their skills out and get back alive. 

Last tip is don't chat anything unnecessary or fall to rage bait. It's alright to be angry and be disappointed but discouraging them through chats make this worse since they will likely throw the game.

emblems.emblem_desc:
The Emblems that I am showing is for farming and can act as a damage dealer or chase since Temporal Reign can decrease the cd time for your other skills after using ult which is great for chasing and skill spam

The 2nd Emblem is seasoned hunter it is better to farm faster to be able to keep up with the enemy jungler and have the upper hand in a later battle (alternative emblem is weapons master which is good for increasing your damage gained from items) 

Last is just straight forward which is for more damage dealt

equips.equip_desc: In this build you can use this effectively if enemy is squishy which melts them down before they can escape and if they managed to run you can chase with the extra movement soeed gained from hunter strike and endless battle.
This is for healers, Tanks, Sustain Fighters to counter their sustainability, heals and shields.

This is where you can be a semi-frontline for your team if your team is squishy or lacks front positions so you can sub as a jungler frontline to give your teammates advantage in the teamfight I often use this when enemy is too tanky or too much crowd control which makes it hard for you to use skills or burst enemies down from the backlines so rather than being the main damage you can become the sub-sustain jungler. 

This is beneficial too so don't doubt it too much.

hero.hero_overview: Alucard is a good pick against enemies that lack mobility or have less mobility than Alucard to which Alucard can use that as an advantage to chase them and burst them but he is not always for 1v5 so no don't think about that everytime you play Alucard but he is indeed a good hero since you can enter enemy turrets and burst someone then dash away to avoid death or further damage against you. Don't be overconfident nor too greedy since it always lead to defeat afterward.
hero.hero_strength: Sustain, Chase, Burst, Mobility, Initiator, Solo Killer, Dashes, Damage, And Teamfight.
hero.hero_weakness: Burst, Slowness, Suppression, Sustained Enemy, Early Invade, Stuns and Fast Enemies.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Perfect tanky initiator with wide aoe stun to compensate for alucard's vulnerability to cc

counters.counter_desc: All heroes that can keep alucard from unleashing his skills and also melts his HP is a huge counter to Alucard

dominants.dominant_desc: I created this battle setup for the massive alucard nerf, tip is to let your team's initiator to go first and never dive many enemies alone, trick is to spend your time 30% safe farming in jungle, 20% getting objectives, 40% hunting damage dealers, and 10% invading thhe enemy jungle when opportunity comes.

emblems.emblem_desc: inspire helps complete the 40% cd reduction, with proper snowball you can utilize festival of blood, and temporal reign is just the best talent for alucard

equips.equip_desc: The boots for better chase power, the sky piercer for extended duration of temporal reign, the hunter strike for extra damage and cd reduction, the endless battle to compliment alucard's passive and for cd reduction, the malefic gun for extra penetration and better chase power, and finally the fleeting time for unlimited ultimate.

dominants.dominant_desc: Helo, lama tak jumpa. Biar betul? Tentulah betul. Saya masih hidup dan bugar. Teknik Terkutuk Songsang? Betul. Pada saat tekak saya ditikam, saya putus asa untuk lawan dan berfokus untuk lancarkan Teknik Terkutuk Songsang. Kuasa terkutuk ialah tenaga negatif.la kuatkan badan tanpa lahirkannya semula. Jadi pendarahan dua tenaga negatif akan menghasilkan tenaga positif. Inilah Teknik Terkutuk Songsang. Senang saja nak cakap, tapi saya tak pernah berjaya. -Saya tak faham kata orang yang mahir gunakannya. -Berleter tanpa henti. Orang ini... menjadi sangat teruja. Namun, sebelum mati, saya telah menguasai... teras kuasa terkutuk. Awak gagal sebab tak memenggal kepala dan tak tikam otak saya dengan alat terkutuk. Gagal? Perlawanan baru nak mula sekarang ???H.Yakah? Ya, mungkin begitu. ???

counters.counter_desc: Since Xavier doesn't have mobility you can kill him easily. However beware of his cc.

Bane is squishy. So he is easy to kill however beware of his healing and damage.
Alucard over powers johnson.

dominants.dominant_desc: Don't dive in straight and also use ult carefully as it is a huge strength of alucard

emblems.emblem_desc: Suggest assassin emblem because it gives extra damage compared to fighter emblem. And temporal reign is a must cause in ult phase your 2 skill cool down with be 2 sec late game wise

equips.equip_desc: The boots are a must. Sea halberd is for attack speed and for anti heal. War axe is a must. Oracle however I chose it for sustain against magic and physical attack and also for advanced regen. Blade of despair is for damage and movement speed if opposition has tanky I suggest building malefic roar for penetration. Queens wing is also a must for sustain.

hero.hero_overview:
Alucard is the best hero if the opposition has no cc or few cc.
He usually shines in these type of games.
hero.hero_strength: Alucard is easy and if used correctly the hero can almost no counter. He can chase as he has a lot of mobility. Don't forget he can 1v4 at least if the opposition as few cc and squishy heroes
hero.hero_weakness: His main weakness is cc and damage. When using him do not straight up dive in 1v5 let's just say don't even think about it.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Alucard is good with Mentor Mentor is good with Alucard Atlas Mentor Jeruk Some defenders help Al-Wocard a lot in the kill.
Angela is the best match for Alucard because when you activate the Alucard, she will give him extra blood, extra life points, and blood regeneration for Alucard.
Estes is also the best assistant with Alucard as Alucard has high life steal with Estes it is difficult for him to die easily
Atlas is perfectly in sync with Alucard, as when Atlas activates Alucard on enemies, he will bring all opponents, giving Alucard the great ability to kill more and steal more life.

Good harmony between Tank and Alucard, as Tgerial can group opponents, and here comes Alucard's role in crushing opponents, as Tgerial has the ability to attack, and his second skill is very good in group combat.

counters.counter_desc: Khofra is also considered good with Alocard and should also be taken into consideration.

dominants.dominant_desc: It's very easy for Alucard to kill the Marksman, but guess who Franco Aurora, Argus, Atlas, and all the heroes that have Stan? You have to wait for the team to start attacking when you see that the stan has become nonexistent. Your attack here will see the merge, explosive damage and life stealing. Just be careful.

Always keep your eyes on the map to see the enemies that can be killed at the beginning of the match. This is good for raising gold at the beginning of the match.Also you have to wait in squad fight you have to wait until the squad starts clashing make yourself the last person to enter so that no stans will be on you
Always wait for your defender to start the attack In team fight you must kill enemies like Marksman. Fighter you should not attack the defenders

hero.hero_strength:
البطل الوكارد جيد في الادغال وفي التوب لين 
ولاكن في الادغال افضل حيث يمكن رفع لفل وا سحق الاعداء اسرع الوكارد لديه بعض الامور يجب اجرائها مثل لاتهجم في البداية انت يجب انتظار المدافع بعدها قم بحركتك الخطيرة اقفز علا الاعداء في المهارة الاولة الت مهارة ثانية سوف ترا   دمج وقوته جميله بين الفريق المجمل
hero.hero_weakness: الوكارد ضعيف امام الستان يجب الخزر من ستان اي بطل ايضا الانتباه من الت ارغوس فهي مضرة في الوكارد ايضا ارورا هي توقف الوكارد فرانكو ايضا يجب الانتباه منه حيث عليك الانتظار حته يضعو مهاراتهم علا فريقك ثم الهجوم
